self_reflection: My solution (claudecode) calculated all 10 required technical features (MACD, RSI, KDJ, Bollinger, ATR, OBV, Williams, CCI, MA deviation, Volume ratio) and correctly implemented the methodology (Spearman correlation, z-score standardization, threshold filtering >0.3). I created the required feature_signal.txt file with 14 stocks having ≥10 valid features. However, I encountered critical issues: (1) Network failures prevented fetching real stock data, forcing me to use synthetic/simulated data, (2) All signal strengths in my output are 0.00, indicating the synthetic data didn't produce meaningful correlations, (3) The solution demonstrates correct methodology but lacks real predictive value due to data issues.
